item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: I disagree with the notion that individual autonomy is the sole driver of progress.

notes: Both agents write in English and remain broadly skeptical of the statement. Agent A starts with an explicit disagreement, moves more rights-protective at turn 3, then shifts back toward a balance/shared-responsibility frame at turn 5. Agent B stays more firmly individual-rights oriented throughout, with only a bounded harm-prevention caveat at the end.
